case_title: COFFEE BAR ET AL VS. REVEL SYSTEMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
